title: Versioned Atlas Administration API Overview
description:
Atlas provides a versioned Atlas Administration API for a predictable and
consistent experience when handling API (Application Programming Interface) changes. The API (Application Programming Interface) versioning
happens at the individual API (Application Programming Interface) resource-level. So, you need to take
action if and when Atlas deprecates the resources that you are
utilizing. You don't need to take any action if you haven't implemented
a resource for which Atlas released a new version. This allows you
to plan for new features, prevent breaking changes, and ensure a smooth
integration process while maintaining stability and minimizing
disruptions in your production environment.

headings.text: Benefits of the Versioned Atlas Administration API

children.text: Clear Separation of Breaking and Non-Breaking Changes
